chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.116 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 10.02.2026 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Zahid Nawaz, advocate a/w complainant ------------------------------------ Applicant Tariq Mukhtar son of Mukhtar Ahmed was admitted to bail by this Court vide order dated 14.01.2026. Record reflects that he has not furnished surety. Again, this matter was taken up on 03.02.2026 when the applicant and his counsel were remained absent and in the interest of justice notice was issued to the applicant and intimation notice to his counsel. Today, neither the applicant nor his counsel is in attendance and still surety has not been furnished by him. Therefore, order dated 14.01.2026 is hereby recalled and instant criminal bail application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
